name: ConceptTree: Bringing Semantic Transparency to Black-Box Decision Making for Robotic Manipulation

description: arXiv:2607.17861v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Establishing interpretable decision-making processes in long-horizon robotic manipulation is critical for enabling reliable human oversight and intervention. However, existing approaches to robotic manipulation largely treat skill selection as opaque mappings from observations to actions, offering limited transparency into how decisions are form...
author: Yongyan Wen, Feifan Liu, Jinyi Chen, Bo An, Peng Liu, Siyuan Li
